info.title: Graph Search and Intelligence
info.description: Microsoft Graph connector for cross-workload search (KQL), Copilot semantic search, document insights, people intelligence, and OneDrive file access. Complements the Graph Mail and Calendar and Graph Meeting Transcripts connectors.

post.summary: Invoke Graph Search and Intelligence MCP
post.description: Sends JSON-RPC requests to invoke Microsoft Graph search and intelligence tools via MCP for Copilot Studio integration.

Search Outlook email messages using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports field-scoped queries like subject:, from:, to:, cc:, hasAttachment:true, received>=2025-01-01. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType message.

enableTopResults.description: Enable hybrid sort for most relevant messages first

post.description: Search Teams chat and channel messages using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports KQL like mentions:{userId}, IsMentioned:true, from:user, hasAttachment:true. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType chatMessage.
Search calendar events using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports KQL like subject:, body:, organizer:, attendees:. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType event.

Search OneDrive and SharePoint files using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports KQL like filename:, filetype:docx, author:, path:, content keywords. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType driveItem.
Search SharePoint sites using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports KQL like site name, description keywords. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType site.
Search SharePoint list items using KQL via Microsoft Graph Search API. Supports list column values and content keywords. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType listItem.

fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return including custom columns

post.description: Search external content ingested via Microsoft Graph connectors using KQL. Requires specifying contentSources with connection IDs. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityType externalItem.

contentSources.description: Comma-separated connection IDs (e.g. "/external/connections/myConnection" or "/external/connections/*" for all)

fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return from the external schema

post.description: Search across Outlook messages and Teams chat messages in a single interleaved call using KQL. Returns results from both sources ranked by relevance. Calls POST /v1.0/search/query with entityTypes message and chatMessage.

queryString.description: KQL query to search across both email and Teams chat (e.g. "project update" or "from:cathy")

200.description: Interleaved search results from email and Teams

post.description: Perform hybrid semantic and lexical search across OneDrive for work or school content using natural language queries. Requires Microsoft 365 Copilot license. Beta endpoint — subject to change.

query.description: Natural language search query (e.g. "Find the board deck from last quarter")

filter.description: KQL path filter (e.g. "filetype:docx" or KQL path expression)

get.description: Get documents trending around the signed-in user based on activity of their closest network. Uses ML-powered analytics across OneDrive and SharePoint.
Get documents shared with or by the signed-in user, ordered by recency of share. Includes URLs, file attachments, and reference attachments from OneDrive, SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams.
Get documents recently viewed or modified by the signed-in user, ranked by recency. Includes OneDrive and SharePoint documents.
Get people ranked by relevance to the signed-in user based on communication patterns, collaboration signals, and business relationships.

parameters.name: $search
parameters.description: Search for people by name or email (e.g. "j" matches names/emails starting with j)

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

get.description: List files recently accessed by the signed-in user. Note: This API is deprecated and will stop returning data after November 2026. Consider using ListUsedDocuments as an alternative.
Get files shared with the signed-in user. Note: This API is deprecated and will stop returning data after November 2026. Consider using ListSharedDocuments (insights) as an alternative.
Get metadata for a specific file or folder in the signed-in user's OneDrive, including name, size, last modified, author, and parent location.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the drive item

get.description: Get the content (download URL) for a file in the signed-in user's OneDrive. Returns a 302 redirect to a pre-authenticated download URL.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the drive item to download

get.description: List the contents of a folder in the signed-in user's OneDrive. Returns files and subfolders.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the folder (use 'root' for the root folder)

get.description: Search for files in the signed-in user's OneDrive by name or content. Lightweight file search scoped to the user's own drive.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text to find in file names and content
